rationale: The user 'user-01$' (a machine account) accessed IPC$ (A0, EV-004, EV-005, EV-006, EV-007) and then SYSVOL (EV-001, EV-002, EV-003) from the same IP address. While machine accounts accessing these shares can be normal, the sequence of accessing IPC$ and then specifically gpt.ini files within SYSVOL is suspicious and could indicate reconnaissance or an attempt to enumerate Group Policy Objects.
